liveIndicators.label: Average house price (UKHPI)
liveIndicators.coverage: Annualised from monthly UKHPI average price for E06000058; each point uses the latest available month in that calendar year.

liveIndicators.label: Population (ONS mid-year, manual import)
liveIndicators.coverage: Snapshot-backed via manual CSV import. Replace data/raw/ons_population.csv with an official extract to publish real values.

liveIndicators.label: Median annual earnings (ASHE, manual import)
liveIndicators.coverage: Snapshot-backed via manual CSV import. Replace data/raw/ashe_earnings.csv with an official extract to publish real values.
